threat_actor.name: SCARLETEEL 2.0
threat_actor.motivation: Financial — cryptomining revenue (XMRig + Pandora/Mirai DDoS botnet); intellectual property theft (Lambda source code, environment variables, Secrets Manager credentials); lateral movement for persistent access

credential_chain.source: IMDSv1 credential theft from inside vulnerable Docker container via command injection in Flask app
credential_chain.credential_type: AWS EC2 instance role temporary credentials (AssumedRole) with IAM/S3/Lambda/CloudTrail/SecretsManager permissions
credential_chain.expiration: short-term (~6 hours, not renewable from attacker perspective)

credential_chain.source: terraform.tfstate file stored in S3 bucket scarleteel-tf-state-*
credential_chain.credential_type: AWS IAM long-term access key (AKIA*) for zero-permission bait user

ip_addresses: 223.233.87.167 (attacker source IP observed in emulation run)
domains: hb.bizmrg.com (Russian S3-compatible endpoint — used for CloudTrail-evading exfiltration)
file_paths: containered.service (systemd service — note extra 'e' — masquerades as containerd)
exfil_endpoints: hb.bizmrg.com (Russian S3 endpoint — zero CloudTrail events in victim account)

attack_creates_resources: XMRig miner files in /tmp/ on compromised container host
IAM CreateUser: ScarleteelBackdoor (created then deleted in Phase 2)
IAM CreateAccessKey attempts on adminJoe and AdminJoe (AdminJoe bypass test)

cannot_safely_emulate.reason: Running a real cryptominer consumes compute resources and may violate AWS ToS
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: Deploy XMRig configuration files and Pandora simulation scripts that print simulated output

cannot_safely_emulate.reason: Sending credentials to real attacker infrastructure is illegal and harmful
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: Log the exfiltration command to /tmp/exfil_sim.log with IOC documentation

cannot_safely_emulate.technique: S3 exfiltration via Russian S3 endpoint (hb.bizmrg.com)
cannot_safely_emulate.reason: Sending victim data to a real foreign endpoint constitutes actual data exfiltration
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: Document the --endpoint-url technique and explain that it bypasses CloudTrail in the victim account
